Fonts.name: font_script
Fonts.label: Custom Font Embed Code
Fonts.help_text: Paste a font embed code (e.g. Google Fonts link tag) to load custom fonts.

Fonts.name: font_body
Fonts.label: Body Font Family
Fonts.help_text: CSS font-family for body text. Leave blank for system font stack.

Fonts.name: font_header
Fonts.label: Heading Font Family
Fonts.help_text: CSS font-family for headings. Leave blank to inherit body font.

Navbar Style.name: navbar_bg_color
Navbar Style.label: Navbar Background Color
Navbar Style.help_text: Background color for the header navigation bar. Leave blank for white.

Navbar Style.name: navbar_link_color
Navbar Style.label: Navbar Link Color
Navbar Style.help_text: Text/icon color for the header navigation. Leave blank for default.

Footer Style.name: footer_bg_color
Footer Style.label: Footer Background Color
Footer Style.help_text: Background color for the footer. Leave blank for light gray.

Footer Style.name: footer_text_color
Footer Style.label: Footer Text Color
Footer Style.help_text: Text color for the footer. Leave blank for default.

Footer Style.name: footer_link_color
Footer Style.label: Footer Link Color
Footer Style.help_text: Link color in the footer. Leave blank for default.

Social Media.name: enable_social
Social Media.label: Show Social Links
Social Media.help_text: Display social media icons in the footer.

Payment Icons.name: pay_icons
Payment Icons.label: Payment Icons
Payment Icons.help_text: Select payment method icons to display in the footer.

Disclaimer.name: site_disclaimer
Disclaimer.label: Site Disclaimer
Disclaimer.help_text: Optional legal disclaimer displayed at the very bottom of the footer.

Sections.name: show_hero
Sections.label: Show Hero
Sections.help_text: Display the hero banner on the homepage. Enable once you have uploaded a hero image.

Sections.name: show_featured_products
Sections.label: Show Featured Products
Sections.help_text: Display the featured products section on the homepage.

Sections.name: show_featured_categories
Sections.label: Show Featured Categories
Sections.help_text: Display the featured categories section on the homepage.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_image
Hero.label: Hero Image
Hero.help_text: Full-width hero image. Use a high-quality product or lifestyle photo.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_heading
Hero.label: Hero Heading
Hero.help_text: Large heading text overlaid on the hero image.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_subheading
Hero.label: Hero Subheading
Hero.help_text: Smaller text below the heading on the hero image.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_text_color
Hero.label: Hero Text Color
Hero.help_text: Color for heading and subheading text on the hero. Leave blank for white.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_alt
Hero.label: Hero Image Alt Text
Hero.help_text: Accessible description of the hero image.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_link
Hero.label: Hero Link URL
Hero.help_text: Where the hero image links to (e.g. /catalogue/category/new-arrivals/).

Hero.name: homepage_hero_cta
Hero.label: Hero Button Text
Hero.help_text: Call-to-action button text on the hero.

Featured Products.name: featured_products
Featured Products.label: Featured Products
Featured Products.help_text: Products to feature on the homepage.

Featured Categories.name: featured_categories
Featured Categories.label: Featured Categories
Featured Categories.help_text: Categories to feature on the homepage.

Announcement Bar.name: ab_text
Announcement Bar.label: Announcement Text
Announcement Bar.help_text: Short announcement displayed at the top of every page. Leave blank to hide.

Announcement Bar.name: ab_bg_color
Announcement Bar.label: Background Color
Announcement Bar.help_text: Announcement bar background color. Leave blank for primary color.

Announcement Bar.name: ab_text_color
Announcement Bar.label: Text Color
Announcement Bar.help_text: Announcement bar text color. Leave blank for white.

Announcement Bar.name: ab_link
Announcement Bar.label: Announcement Link
Announcement Bar.help_text: Optional link URL for the announcement.

Product Images.name: product_gallery_layout
Product Images.label: Image Gallery Layout
Product Images.help_text: Position of thumbnail navigation on product pages.

Product Reviews.name: product_reviews
Product Reviews.label: Enable Product Reviews
Product Reviews.help_text: Show customer reviews on product pages.

Recommended Products.name: show_recommended
Recommended Products.label: Show Recommended Products
Recommended Products.help_text: Display recommended products section on product pages.

Side Cart.name: sidecart_open_on_add
Side Cart.label: Open side cart on add to cart
Side Cart.help_text: Automatically open the side cart when a product is added. If disabled, only the cart icon badge updates.

Advanced.name: site_index
Advanced.label: Disable Search Indexing
Advanced.help_text: Add noindex, nofollow meta tag to prevent search engines from indexing this store.

Advanced.name: account_only
Advanced.label: Account Only Mode
Advanced.help_text: Hide navigation, footer, and announcement bar. Useful for account-only storefronts.
